author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kanojo, Okarishimasu' Sixth Season Announced
The official website of the Kanojo, Okarishimasu (Rent-a-Girlfriend) television anime announced a sixth season on Saturday. The character designer, Kanna Hirayama, drew an illustration to commemorate the announcement (pictured above). Produced by TMS Entertainment, the 12-episode first season aired in Summer 2020, followed by the second and third season in Summer 2022 and Summer 2023. The fourth season aired in Summer 2026, while the fifth and latest season premiered on April 11 and concluded w...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Shuumatsu no Walküre' Gets Fourth Season
Production company Warner Bros. Japan announced a fourth season for the Shuumatsu no Walküre (Record of Ragnarok) anime series on Friday, revealing a special announcement promotional video, and a commemorative illustration (pictured) by the manga's illustrator Ajichika. The first season, produced by Graphinica, debuted worldwide on Netflix in 12 episodes in June 2021. The 15-episode second season, co-produced by Graphinica and Yumeta Company, streamed on Netflix in two parts in January...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Snowball Earth' Gets Second Season
The 13th and final episode of Snowball Earth ended with an announcement on Friday that a second season is in production. The official website also revealed an announcement promo and celebratory visual (pictured above). Produced by Studio KAI, the first season premiered on April 3. Crunchyroll simulcasted the anime with subtitles in multiple languages and an English dub. The anime series adapts Yuuhirou Tsujitsugu's action sci-fi manga, which began in Gekkan! Spirits magazine in January 202...

text:
'Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai' Reveals Additional Cast, Character Promo, Fall 2026 Debut
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Kazami Sawatari's Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai (The Salt-God Satou-san Is Only Sweet To Me!) light novel revealed additional cast, a key visual (pictured), and the character promotional video on Friday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere in October 2026. Cast Rinka Sudo: Miyu Tomita (Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai? author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu II' Reveals Additional Cast, Second Promo
The official website for the Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu (Skeleton Knight in Another World) television anime revealed additional cast, a second promotional video, and a key visual (pictured) for the second season on Thursday. The second season adapting Ennki Hakari's action fantasy light novel will begin airing on July 6 at 10:00 p.m. on AT-X, followed by Tokyo MX, and BS11. Cast Charos: Mitsuo Iwata (MF Ghost) Ein: Kento Hama (Touken Ranbu: Hanamaru) Hanzou: Hiroshi N...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Mao' Reveals Additional Cast, Opening Theme for Second Cour
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Rumiko Takahashi's Mao manga revealed additional cast, a second key visual (pictured right), and the opening theme for second cour on Friday. The anime series premiered on April 4 at 11:45 p.m. on NHK G. Cast Hakubi: Takuya Satou (Yuukoku no Moriarty) Natsuno: Rie Kugimiya (Gintama) Daigo: Katsuyuki Konishi (Kimetsu no Yaiba) Souma Kagami: Tasuku Kaito (Blue Lock) Kagari Houshou: Shino Shimoji (Sekai Saikou no Ansatsusha, Isekai K...

text:
'Sekai Saikyou no Majo, Hajimemashita' Reveals Additional Cast Pair, Character Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Mochimaru Sakaki's Sekai Saikyou no Majo, Hajimemashita: Watashi dake "Kouryaku Site" wo Mireru Sekai de Jiyuu ni Ikimasu (The World's Strongest Witch: I'm Starting My Free Life in a World Where Only I Can See the Online Strategy Guide) light novel revealed a pair of additional cast and character promotional video on Friday.
